parsed_review.summary: CP00-708 is a clean, descriptor-only continuation of the RP23 External Integrations II finance-integrations series (CP694-CP707), and its descriptor-verified production_ready claim is well supported. The CP708 binding (registry.js:239) matches the baseline exactly (risk A, 10 units, RP23.P05.M03.S09-S18, next CP00-709/RP23.P05.M03.S19), and the CP708 requirements (registry.js:2023) match the prompt's deliverable distribution (implementation:3, security_audit:2, fixture:1, test:3, hermes_evidence:1) and micro_title distribution (Primary Implementation Slice:10). Coverage and descriptor validation are clean (errors:[]) both in code and as embedded in the regenerated contract (cp708 coverage.valid/descriptor.valid true; latest_pack and latest_projection = CP00-708; CP694-CP707 preserved as historical; validation.valid:true). Tests (model.test.js:44-46) exercise the CP00-708 binding/coverage, runtime-closed descriptor/packets (claude non-final, human approval required for runtime opening, runtime_opening_pack_id CP00-709, hermes emits_runtime_receipt:false, claude read_only:true), and the contract projection. No-write/no-real-data boundaries hold: NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION is all-false for product-state/runtime/credential/audit/permission exposure, command-evidence records 24/24 commands at exit 0 with no_real_data:true, and the security_audit rows (S11 Audit hint, S12 Security trimming) carry only base safety fields with no audit-body or permission-decision leakage. The authority boundary is intact: Claude is a read-only independent reviewer and not final approver, enterprise trust is closed and human-gated, and Hermes is used only for deterministic control-plane evidence packets, not product runtime. Review hardening checks pass: readiness auth preflight succeeded with well-formed JSON, no forbidden tools, schema present, and zero prior invalid review attempts. The pack correctly holds production_ready:false / runtime_ready:false pending this single valid receipt, with no premature or over-broad runtime/enterprise-trust claims. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings. Note: this receipt is an independent read-only review only and is not final human/enterprise-trust approval, which remains outside this receipt by design.
